hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILE" ] && dart format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && grep -q '@freezed\|@riverpod\|@JsonSerializable' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[Hook] Code generation needed. Run: flutter pub run build_runner build'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'flutter run\|flutter test --watch'; then echo '[Hook] WARNING: Long-running command detected. Consider running in separate terminal.'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git push' && [ -f pubspec.yaml ]; then command -v flutter >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; echo '[Hook] Running tests before push...'; flutter test --no-pub || (echo '[Hook] Tests failed! Push cancelled.'; exit 1); fi
if [ -f analysis_options.yaml ]; then flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'error|warning' | head -10 || echo '[Flutter Dev Assistant] No analysis issues found'; fi
